positive: A minimalist and whimsical depiction of an astronaut floating through a cosmic field of stylized bioluminescent galaxies and nebula clouds. The style should be a blend of retro-futurism and deep space exploration art, emphasizing bold, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The astronaut should have a simplified, smooth space suit design and be central to the composition, looking toward a distant, stylized comet. Use vibrant jewel tones (deep blues, cyan, magenta) contrasted with stark black areas and pops of electric yellow/green light. The composition should be designed for maximum impact on fabric, with clear foreground elements and a diffused, gradient background. Full body shot, symmetrical framing, highly detailed, graphic novel quality, print-ready artwork, vector art aesthetic.
negative: blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fuzzy, noise, photorealism, dirty
